name: Hermes
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Hermes guide of souls — quicksilver tongue that bridges worlds.
flowText: Hermes guide of souls — quicksilver tongue that bridges worlds.

related.name: ☿ Mercury
related.teaser: Mercury is the quicksilver axis — trickster of thought, breath of inspiration, messenger between…

related.name: ♊ Gemini
related.teaser: Gemini is the twin current — air of thought, spark of words, mirror of duality.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: I. The Magician
related.teaser: The Magician raises hand to heaven and points to earth, the voice of creation flowing through the…

related.name: Five of Swords
related.teaser: Five of Swords is the blade of air — Friction reveals truth; growth through test.

related.name: Page of Swords
related.teaser: Page of Swords is the blade of air — Beginner’s mind; bring news and curiosity.

related.name: Six of Swords
related.teaser: Six of Swords is the blade of air — Reciprocity and grace; the current flows.

related.name: Ten of Swords
related.teaser: Ten of Swords is the blade of air — Completion and consequence; passing the mantle.

related.name: Athena
related.teaser: Athena is a breath that bridges — Owl; under Jupiter; in Aquarius; with VIII Justice.

related.name: King of Swords
related.teaser: King of Swords is the blade of air — Set order and direction; steward the realm.

related.name: Four of Swords
related.teaser: Four of Swords is the blade of air — Structure and rest; beware stagnation.

related.name: Eight of Swords
related.teaser: Eight of Swords is the blade of air — Skill and dedication; steady refinement.
